title: Parameter
description: Schema for an Amazon Systems Manager Parameter Store parameter, representing a configuration value stored securely for use across AWS services and applications.

Name.description: The fully qualified name of the parameter, including the hierarchy path.

Value.description: The parameter value. For StringList, values are comma-separated. For SecureString, the value is encrypted.

ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the parameter.

LastModifiedDate.description: Date the parameter was last changed or updated.

LastModifiedUser.description: The ARN of the user or role that last changed the parameter.

AllowedPattern.description: A regular expression used to validate the parameter value.

KeyId.description: The ID of the query key used for encrypting SecureString parameter values.

DataType.description: The data type of the parameter, such as text or aws:ec2:image.

Policies.description: A list of policies associated with the parameter.

PolicyText.description: The JSON text of the policy.

Selector.description: Either the version number or the label used to retrieve the parameter value.

SourceResult.description: Applies to parameters that reference information in other AWS services.
